mundo.titulo: Why did Starmer resign and what could happen next?
mundo.resumen: The Labour leader says he will remain prime minister until his successor is chosen.
BBC Verify looks at the record of Sir Keir's time in government in six key areas since he took office in July 2024.

mundo.titulo: Who is Andy Burnham? Ex-Manchester mayor who wants to lead the country
mundo.resumen: The outgoing Greater Manchester mayor is lining up a third attempt to be Labour leader following his return to Westminster.

mundo.titulo: Watch and read Starmer's resignation speech in full
mundo.resumen: Sir Keir announces he will be step down as Labour leader and PM in a Downing Street address.

mundo.titulo: Top lawyer whose 'Mr Rules' approach failed to connect with the public
mundo.resumen: Less than two years after he won a huge majority in the 2024 general election, Sir Keir Starmer has been forced out.

mundo.titulo: How four weeks in court unravelled 'sinful and deceitful' Jeffrey Donaldson
mundo.resumen: The former DUP leader entered calm court on day one calm and relaxed, but by the end he was alone as the jury found him guilty on 18 child sex abuse charges.

negocios.titulo: EasyJet says US bidder trying to buy it 'on the cheap' as it rejects £4.7bn offer
negocios.resumen: The airline describes the latest bid approach from Castlelake as "highly opportunistic".

negocios.titulo: Alan Greenspan, architect of the modern American economy, dies aged 100
negocios.resumen: As chairman of the Federal Reserve, Alan Greenspan became the world's most high-profile banker.

negocios.titulo: Fake romance to missed deliveries: How to protect yourself from three common scams
negocios.resumen: Romance and investment fraud is at record levels but what can you do to prevent being caught out.

negocios.titulo: South East Water announces new chief executive
negocios.resumen: John Halsall has previously worked for Thames Water, South West Water and Network Rail.

negocios.titulo: Toy Story 5 scores record opening weekend for franchise
negocios.resumen: The film's opening is a return to form for Disney and Pixar after facing notable challenges in recent years.

negocios.titulo: Is Germany looking again at coal-powered electricity?
negocios.resumen: It had planned to abandon the fuel, but the higher cost of natural gas may make it think again.

tecnologia.titulo: WhatsApp gets new chief as Meta taps India’s CRED founder Kunal Shah, and invests $900M in startup
tecnologia.resumen: WhatsApp gets a new boss, as Will Cathcart moves to a new role at Meta, while Shah steps down as CEO of Indian fintech giant CRED to replace Cathcart.

tecnologia.titulo: Instagram looks to take on streaming services with longer-form, episodic and live formats for its TV app
tecnologia.resumen: Instagram is coming for streaming services like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video as it sets its ambitions for living room viewing.

tecnologia.titulo: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
tecnologia.resumen: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register here.

tecnologia.titulo: Lucid Motors’ new CEO cuts 18% of staff to ‘simplify the company’
tecnologia.resumen: The company is also eliminating a production shift at its Arizona factory to align "production plans with anticipated demand."

tecnologia.titulo: Seedcamp raises $320M for its new fund to expand its US footprint
tecnologia.resumen: After 18 years of focusing on Europe, early-stage investor Seedcamp said that it has raised $320 million for its latest fund which will see it expanding its presence in the United States.

tecnologia.titulo: Klue hack results in data breach at several cybersecurity firms
tecnologia.resumen: Huntress, HackerOne, Jamf, Recorded Future, and Tanium are among the cybersecurity companies that had data stolen following an earlier breach at market research firm Klue.
